calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Kevin Frederick, Esq. for plaintiff Silver View Terrace Homeowners Assoc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Gabrezle Redick (as property manager) was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default has been entered against the defendant.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff, and against the Defaulted Defendant Victor Nieves for Judgment as follows:

Past-due assessments - $8,771.99
Late Charges, Interest and Attorney's Fees $1,635.00
Costs - $1,377.00
Total $11,783.99 and the Assessment Lien is foreclosed and sale of the subject real property is hereby ordered (see scanned doc. for details of the judgment)
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
